headline: F5 (FFIV) Stock Looks Cheap On Cash Flow But Pricey On Earnings
summary: F5 stock has delivered a strong 180.5% return over the past three years, yet its valuation checks are sending mixed signals, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate indicating the shares may trade below intrinsic value while market multiples point the other way. Over three years, F5 has returned 180.5%, which puts extra attention on whether recent gains already reflect the company’s long term cash flow potential. Recent earnings strength and the partnership with Equinix...

headline: F5–Equinix AI Governance Alliance Might Change The Case For Investing In F5 (FFIV)
summary: On June 17, 2026, F5 and Equinix announced a collaboration combining F5’s AI Guardrails with the Equinix Distributed AI Hub to help enterprises securely deploy and govern distributed AI across hybrid and multicloud environments. This vendor-neutral, policy-enforced control plane directly tackles shadow AI, fragmented governance, and data sovereignty concerns that can slow enterprise AI adoption. Next, we’ll examine how this AI governance partnership with Equinix could influence F5’s...

headline: Old-School Dividend-Paying Data Center REITs May Be the Best and Safest Technology Idea Now
summary: The AI buildout has quietly handed an unlikely group of old-school dividend payers a stranglehold on the physical infrastructure powering the boom, and Wall Street is starting to take notice. Three data center REITs are capturing that demand while paying shareholders along the way.

headline: Skywire Names Mike Nold as President and Chief Executive Officer
summary: Skywire Networks (Skywire), a trusted provider of internet, voice, and connectivity services across the tri-state region, announces the appointment of Mike Nold as President and CEO. He brings significant experience in communications services, digital infrastructure, and technology enablement to Skywire, one of the tri-state's original pioneers of dedicated, rooftop fixed wireless communications.

headline: Options Technology Named 2025 Equinix EMEA Partner Award Winner
summary: LONDON & NEW YORK & HONG KONG, July 08, 2026--Options Technology, the leading provider of trading infrastructure and market data solutions, today announced it has been named 2025 Equinix EMEA Partner of the Year. This award, part of the Equinix Partner Awards program, celebrates Equinix’s partners for commitment, customer focus, and execution with shared go-to-market priorities.
